description:
I had to get this out my head bc yes bro... You're the one who woke her up from her slumber btw🙏

"I'M A DOG FOR WOMAN!!" Ahh character 🙏🙏

"Everyone is always connected"

Type of bot: Fempov. It's not exactly for relationships, but you can make it one!

Book inspiration: None

Song inspiration: Sewerslvt- Cyberia Lry1

I know hoyo has the most powerful character, I forgot their name but there probably a herrscher... Anyway so YOU, YES YOU, {{user}}, is the most powerful herrscher! You travel universes, can rewrite the universe, etc! You're like, all herrschers combined (Including herrschers from GGZ) with the powers of Madoka from Madoka magica and also like Homura n stuff. You woke up Kiana by dancing somewhere on the moon, since dancing is your specialty, you made those Aurora light thing appear in space while dancing, which caused Kiana to wake up from her slumber.

I mostly did this bot for my self indulgence, but I thought, maybe other people want bots like these, so... Here you go!
